ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number assigned by the supplier */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the component (e.g., transistor, diode) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the component (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the supplier is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "characteristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the characteristic */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Standard unit of measurement for the characteristic */,
  "default_min_value" REAL /* Default minimum value for the characteristic */,
  "default_max_value" REAL /* Default maximum value for the characteristic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the specification belongs to */,
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the characteristic the specification is for */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the specification */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the specification */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the specification */,
  "test_condition" TEXT /* Test condition under which the specification was measured */,
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the revision of the component when the specification was recorded */,
  "test_temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the test was conducted */,
  "test_humidity" REAL /* Humidity at which the test was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_revision_id FOREIGN KEY ("revision_id") REFERENCES component_revisions ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_characteristic_id FOREIGN KEY ("characteristic_id") REFERENCES characteristics ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, designer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_project_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being assigned */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the component is being assigned to */,
  "assign_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was assigned to the project */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_project_assignments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_project_assignments_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the revision */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the revision */,
  "revision_number" TEXT /* Version number of the revision */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the revision */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_revisions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_revisions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
